description: Initialize Tauri project structure with src-tauri/ directory
steps: Run `npx tauri init` to scaffold src-tauri/
Verify generation of tauri.conf.json, Cargo.toml, src/main.rs, src/lib.rs
Ensure Tauri v2 patterns are used (not v1)
Configure app identifier and window settings
Verify configuration matches existing Vite setup

description: Add Tauri npm scripts without breaking existing workflow
steps: Verify existing 'dev' and 'build' scripts remain unchanged
Test that 'npm run dev' still works as standalone Vite server

description: Create environment detection utility for Tauri/browser modes
steps: Add TypeScript type definitions for Tauri globals
Write unit tests for environment detection

description: Update CI workflow for Tauri builds
steps: Configure matrix builds for macOS, Windows, Linux
Ensure all existing CI checks still run
Verify no other Tauri artifacts need exclusion

description: Verify Tauri dev mode launches native window
steps: Verify existing React app renders correctly in window

description: Verify standalone Vite dev server still works
steps: Verify all existing features work in browser mode
Confirm no Tauri-related errors in console
Confirm all 73 existing test files pass
Verify no test failures introduced by Tauri scaffold
Check test coverage remains at target levels

description: Verify CI builds pass on all platforms
